en: I mean that the heir, as long as he is a child, is no different from a slave, though he is the owner of everything,
zh: 我說，那承受產業的，雖然是全部產業的主人，但在孩童的時期，卻和奴僕沒有分別。

en: but he is under guardians and managers until the date set by his father.
zh: 他是在監護人和管家之下，直到父親預先指定的時候。

en: In the same way we also, when we were children, were enslaved to the elementary principles of the world.
zh: 我們也是這樣，作孩童的時候，被世俗的言論所奴役；

en: But when the fullness of time had come, God sent forth his Son, born of woman, born under the law,
zh: 但到了時機成熟， 神就差遣他的兒子，由女人所生，而且生在律法之下，

en: to redeem those who were under the law, so that we might receive adoption as sons.
zh: 要把律法之下的人救贖出來，好讓我們得著嗣子的名分。

en: And because you are sons, God has sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts, crying, "Abba! Father!"
zh: 你們既然是兒子， 神就差遣他兒子的靈進入我們心裡，呼叫“阿爸、父！”

en: So you are no longer a slave, but a son, and if a son, then an heir through God.
zh: 這樣，你不再是奴僕，而是兒子；既然是兒子，就靠著 神承受產業了。

en: Formerly, when you did not know God, you were enslaved to those that by nature are not gods.
zh: 從前你們不認識 神的時候，是給那些本來不是 神的作奴僕；

en: But now that you have come to know God, or rather to be known by God, how can you turn back again to the weak and worthless elementary principles of the world, whose slaves you want to be once more?
zh: 現在你們既然認識 神，更可以說是 神所認識的，怎麼還回到那些軟弱貧乏的言論，情願再作它們的奴僕呢？

en: You observe days and months and seasons and years!
zh: 你們嚴守日子、月份、節期、年份；

en: I am afraid I may have labored over you in vain.
zh: 我為你們擔心，恐怕我在你們身上的勞苦是白費了。

en: Brothers, I entreat you, become as I am, for I also have become as you are. You did me no wrong.
zh: 弟兄們，我請求你們要像我一樣，因為我也像你們一樣。你們並沒有虧負過我。

en: You know it was because of a bodily ailment that I preached the gospel to you at first,
zh: 你們知道，我第一次傳福音給你們，是因為身體有病。

en: and though my condition was a trial to you, you did not scorn or despise me, but received me as an angel of God, as Christ Jesus.
zh: 雖然我的身體對你們是個試煉，你們卻沒有輕看，也沒有厭棄，反而接納我，好像 神的天使，也好像基督耶穌。

en: What then has become of the blessing you felt? For I testify to you that, if possible, you would have gouged out your eyes and given them to me.
zh: 現在，你們的歡樂在哪裡呢？我可以為你們作證，那時如果可能，你們甚至願意把你們的眼睛剜出來給我哩！

en: Have I then become your enemy by telling you the truth?
zh: 現在我把真理告訴你們，反而成了你們的仇敵嗎？

en: They make much of you, but for no good purpose. They want to shut you out, that you may make much of them.
zh: 那些人熱心待你們，並不是出於好意，而是想你們和我疏遠，好使你們熱心待他們。

en: It is always good to be made much of for a good purpose, and not only when I am present with you,
zh: 常常在善事上熱心，總是好的；只是不要我在你們那裡的時候才是這樣。

en: my little children, for whom I am again in the anguish of childbirth until Christ is formed in you!
zh: 我的孩子們，為了你們我再受生產的痛苦，直到基督在你們裡面成形。

en: I wish I could be present with you now and change my tone, for I am perplexed about you.
zh: 我恨不得現今就在你們那裡，改變我的語氣，因為我為你們十分困擾。

en: Tell me, you who desire to be under the law, do you not listen to the law?
zh: 你們這願意在律法之下的人哪！請告訴我，你們沒有聽過律法嗎？

en: For it is written that Abraham had two sons, one by a slave woman and one by a free woman.
zh: 經上記著說，亞伯拉罕有兩個兒子，一個出於婢女，一個出於自由的婦人。

en: But the son of the slave was born according to the flesh, while the son of the free woman was born through promise.
zh: 但那出於婢女的，是按著肉體生的；那出於自由的婦人的，是憑著應許生的。

en: Now this may be interpreted allegorically: these women are two covenants. One is from Mount Sinai, bearing children for slavery; she is Hagar.
zh: 這都是寓意的說法：那兩個婦人就是兩個約，一個是出於西奈山，生子作奴僕，這是夏甲。

en: Now Hagar is Mount Sinai in Arabia; she corresponds to the present Jerusalem, for she is in slavery with her children.
zh: 這夏甲是指著阿拉伯的西奈山，相當於現在的耶路撒冷，她和她的兒女都是作奴僕的。

en: But the Jerusalem above is free, and she is our mother.
zh: 那在上面的耶路撒冷是自由的，她是我們的母親，

en: For it is written, "Rejoice, O barren one who does not bear; break forth and cry aloud, you who are not in labor! For the children of the desolate one will be more than those of the one who has a husband."
zh: 因為經上記著說： “不能生育、沒有生養的啊，你要歡欣！ 沒有受過生產痛苦的啊，你要呼喊，大聲呼叫！ 因為棄婦比有夫之婦有更多兒子。”

en: Now you, brothers, like Isaac, are children of promise.
zh: 可是，弟兄們，你們是按著應許作兒女的，好像以撒一樣。

en: But just as at that time he who was born according to the flesh persecuted him who was born according to the Spirit, so also it is now.
zh: 不過，當時那按著肉體生的，迫害那按著聖靈生的，現在也是這樣。

en: But what does the Scripture say? "Cast out the slave woman and her son, for the son of the slave woman shall not inherit with the son of the free woman."
zh: 然而經上怎樣說呢？“把婢女和她的兒子趕出去，因為婢女的兒子，絕對不可以和自由的婦人的兒子一同承受產業。”

en: So, brothers, we are not children of the slave but of the free woman.
zh: 所以，弟兄們，我們不是婢女的兒女，而是自由的婦人的兒女了。
